reviews.comment:
Falta organizar mejor la espera para cargar nafta, muy lento. Cada auto debería entrar y ubicarse solo, no esperar que se decidan a llamarte y así evitar la fila de autos.

(Translated by Google)
The gas station wait times need to be better organized; they're very slow. Each car should be able to enter and park itself, instead of waiting for someone to call you, thus avoiding the long lines.
